conditions.description: Participation is restricted to legal entities established in EU Member States, Iceland, Norway, and associated countries: Canada, Israel, Republic of Korea, New Zealand, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
Entities controlled by non-eligible countries may be excluded unless appropriate guarantees are provided.
Activities are expected to start at TRL 2 and achieve TRL 5 by the end of the project; proposals falling outside this TRL range are out of scope.
Maximum EU contribution per project is EUR 19,000,000 (minimum contribution also set at EUR 19,000,000).

All proposals must implement the co-programmed European Partnership on AI, Data and Robotics (ADRA) by allocating tasks for cohesion activities with ADRA and the GenAI4EU central Hub (CSA HORIZON-CL4-2025-03-HUMAN-18).

Standard Horizon Europe RIA minimum consortium size and composition requirements are presumed to apply (minimum three independent legal entities from three different Member States or associated countries).
conditions.assumption_note: The eligibility_conditions field in the slice source is empty. The curated extract's eligibility_restrictions address only geographic participation restrictions. Standard Horizon Europe RIA minimum consortium requirements are assumed to apply per the General Annex B framework but are not explicitly stated in these topic-level source documents. Verify against Tier 1 General Annexes before use in downstream proposal content.

conditions.description: Open access obligations for scientific publications and research data apply under standard Horizon Europe RIA grant conditions.
conditions.assumption_note: Open access requirements are not explicitly stated in the topic-level source documents (eligibility_conditions field is empty in the slice). This condition is assumed to apply as a standard Horizon Europe RIA grant requirement per the Model Grant Agreement and General Annexes. Verify against Tier 1 normative sources before applying to proposal content.
